# extraoperators

An `R` package with operators to help speed up everyday tasks.

## Installation

To get the latest development version, use:

``` r

#install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("JWiley/extraoperators")
```

Otherwise to get from CRAN use:

``` r

install.packages("extraoperators")
```

## Overview

The table below summarizes what this package provides. Fundamentally it
provides or expands on several logical operators, which can be accessed
on their own to return a logical vector, but also prefixed by `?`
(which) to return the **indices** that are `TRUE` or prefixed by `s`
(subset) to return only those **values** that are `TRUE` or prefixed by
`a` (all) to return a single logical value, are ALL true? They can also
be prefixed by `any` to return a single logical value, is ANY true? An
entire all logical comparison can be prefixed by `!` to generate a NONE
evaluation.

| Operator | What it does | Which? | Subset | All | Any |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| == | Are values / vectors equal | %?==% | %s==% | %a==% | %any==% |
| != | Are values / vector NOT equal | %?!=% | %s!=% | %a!=% | %any!=% |
| %l% | Less than | %?l% | %sl% | %al% | %anyl% |
| %le% | Less than or equal | %?le% | %sle% | %ale% | %anyle% |
| %g% | Greater than | %?g% | %sg% | %ag% | %anyg% |
| %ge% | Greater than or equal | %?ge% | %sge% | %age% | %anyge% |
| %gl% | Greater than AND less than | %?gl% | %sgl% | %agl% | %anygl% |
| %gel% | Greater than or equal AND less than | %?gel% | %sgel% | %agel% | %anygel% |
| %gle% | Greater than AND less than or equal | %?gle% | %sgle% | %agle% | %anygle% |
| %gele% | Greater than or equal AND less than or equal | %?gele% | %sgele% | %agele% | %anygele% |
| %in% | In | %?in% | %sin% | %ain% | %anyin% |
| %!in% OR %nin% | Not in | %?!in% OR %?nin% | %s!in% OR %snin% | %a!in% OR %anin% | %any!in% OR %anynin% |
| %c% | Chain operations on the RHS together | %?c% | %sc% | %ac% | %anyc% |
| %e% | Set operator, to use set notation | %?e% | %se% | %ae% | %anye% |
| %grepl% | does text match a regular expression | %?grepl% | %sgrepl% | %agrepl% | %anygrepl% |
| %!grepl% | does text NOT match a regular expression | %?!grepl% | %s!grepl% | %a!grepl% | %any!grepl% |
| %flipIn% | In, ignoring order around a colon | – | – | – | %anyflipIn% |
| %===% | Are objects strictly identical | – | – | – | – |
| %!==% | Are objects not strictly identical | – | – | – | – |

Using these operators, you can accomplish many different tasks by just
remembering the additional prefixes: `?` for
[`which()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/which.html), `a` for
[`all()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/all.html), `any` for
[`any()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/any.html), and `s` for
[`subset()`](https://rdrr.io/r/base/subset.html). While simple, this can
save quite a few keystrokes and make various logical comparisons less
convoluted.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`` `%c%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/grapes-c-grapes.md)
  : Chain Operator
- [`` `%e%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/grapes-e-grapes.md)
  : Element In Set Operator
- [`` `%===%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/identity_operators.md)
  [`` `%!==%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/identity_operators.md)
  : Strict Identity Operators
- [`` `%agele%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%agel%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%agle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%agl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%age%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%ag%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%ale%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%al%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%ain%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%a!in%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%anin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%a==%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%a!=%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%ac%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%ae%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%agrepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  [`` `%a!grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalall.md)
  : Several ways to evaluate whether all values meet logical conditions
  including logical range comparison helpers
- [`` `%anygele%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anygel%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anygle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anygl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyge%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyg%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%any!in%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anynin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%any==%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%any!=%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyc%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anye%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anygrepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%any!grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  [`` `%anyflipIn%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalany.md)
  : Several ways to evaluate whether any values meet logical conditions
- [`` `%gele%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%gel%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%gle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%gl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%g%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%ge%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%l%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%le%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%!in%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%nin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%flipIn%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  [`` `%!grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicals.md)
  : Several logical range comparison helpers
- [`` `%?gele%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?gel%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?gle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?gl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?ge%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?g%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?le%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?l%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?in%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?!in%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?nin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?==%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?!=%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?c%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?e%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  [`` `%?!grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/logicalwhich.md)
  : Several ways to return an index based on logical range comparison
  helpers
- [`` `%sgele%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sgel%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sgle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sgl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sge%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sg%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sle%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%s!in%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%snin%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%s==%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%s!=%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%sc%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  [`` `%se%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)

  [`` `%s!grepl%` ``](https://joshuawiley.com/extraoperators/reference/subsetting.md)
  : Several ways to subset based on logical range comparison helpers
